key_finding: V→final raw signal REPLICATES on Mistral (R=0.23, p<0.001), but V→final|nums does NOT (R=0.06, p>0.08) — Mistral's forward-looking signal explained by problem numbers. WRRA 38% (below chance, n=29). Phase 2 evidence revised from MODERATE to WEAK-MODERATE.
evidence_impact: Mixed replication weakens Phase 2 forward-looking evidence. Raw V signal cross-model; residualized V signal Qwen-specific so far. Need high-accuracy model replication to disambiguate power vs architecture.
next_planned: Paraphrase disruption (Experiment B) — independent test. Or Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct replication (higher accuracy, tests accuracy selection confound).

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: WEAK-MODERATE (revised down): V→final raw signal replicates cross-model (R=0.23 Mistral, p<0.001). But V→final|nums NOT significant on Mistral (R=0.06, p>0.08). WRRA below chance on Mistral (38%). Residualized signal Qwen-specific so far.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: raw V→final on 2 families. Residualized V|nums on Qwen ONLY. WRRA on Qwen ONLY.
